d1_provenance_gap_note: The diagnostic_run manifest emits universe_source_url=null for multi-URL universes (loader contract: only single-URL universes carry a single source_url). This sidecar records the three iShares CDN URLs unioned into the sp_1500 variant. Per-URL fetch timestamps are not tracked at the loader level for the original D3 fetch; the D5 audit re-fetch timestamps above are the closest available evidence of per-URL fetch coherence.
d5_d_clean_checkout_assertion: The D3 manifest records harness_git_sha=56e0677737da504b2e3559998ca352bb374434de with no automatic clean-tree assertion (the diagnostic_run script does not currently capture git_dirty). This run was kicked off by the study implementer at 2026-04-25T07:34Z immediately after commit 56e0677 (the D2 follow-up aggregator commit) was made; no further edits to research/ were made until 2026-04-25T08:11Z when D3 artifact-generation began (after the run finished). The clean-checkout assertion is procedural for THIS run; the diagnostic_run script has been amended in a D5 follow-up commit to capture git_dirty at run time for FUTURE runs.
d5_d_fund_holdings_coherence: D5 round-1 mid-fetch-update audit: re-fetched all three iShares URLs on 2026-04-25T18:25Z (~10 hours after the original D3 run at 07:34Z). All three sub-ETF CSV headers report "Fund Holdings as of: Apr 23, 2026" identically. iShares' fund composition has not changed between the D3 fetch and the D5 audit re-fetch, providing strong evidence that the original D3 universe is internally consistent for the Apr 23, 2026 as-of date — independent of the wall-clock fetch timing of each sub-ETF.
